noticia.titulo: Marketing Macabre: How To Market Your Horror Star
noticia.texto_resumido: You’ve done the impossible: you’ve secured a recognizable name for your independent horror film. Whether it’s a genre icon with a cult following or a rising star, their presence is your film’s biggest marketing asset. Marketing Macabre, the premier boutique public relations firm dedicated to the genre, is officially expanding its 2026 service suite to … The post Marketing Macabre: How To Market Your Horror Star appeared first on Horror News | HNN .
